zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: shopLAStyle.com
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: Style-making on-line retailer saves time and keeps customers happy by printing its own gift cards.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Vail Resorts
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: Vail Resorts, Inc, through its subsidiaries, is the leading mountain resort operator in the United States and keeps raising the bar in terms of guest experiences. With a mission of "Extraordinary resorts, Exceptional experiences," Vail saw an opportunity to improve guests' experiences by implementing Easy Scan RFID Lift Access for scanning season passes.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Alaska Division of Motor Vehicles
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text:
The Alaska Division of Motor Vehicles, based in Anchorage, serves the state with 31 offices.
Statewide, the division issues more than 230,000 drivers licenses and state identification cards
each year, as well as state employee ID badges. The division provides cards on-demand to
residents and recently began printing mail-in renewals at its main office.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Nuclear Regulatory Commission
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: In response to the increased potential of terrorist attacks against key facilities, the Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) has raised security standards for nuclear power plants. American Barcode & RFID --a Zebra Card Printer Solutions partner—has created a custom ID verification application to help a major power provider meet the NRC's new security requirements, increase efficiency, and reduce costs.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: University of Duisburg-Essen, Germany
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: The University of Duisburg-Essen (UDE) is renowned as a leading technology innovator. The UDE chose Zebra Technologies to develop an innovative, customized card printing solution.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Manpower
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: Manpower uses Zebra badges and access software to keep headquarters secure while maintaining welcoming environment.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: City of Unalaska, AK
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: An Alaskan city uses Zebra card printers and supplies to provide its residents with passes to the city's recreational and community centers.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Rittenhouse Hotel
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: The Rittenhouse is Philadelphia's most prestigious hotel address, featuring all of the unique historic charm and residential ambiance of Rittenhouse Square. Whenever on duty, all 280+ employees are required to display their laminated photo ID cards, which the hotel previously created using an outdated in-house camera system.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Identisys
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: IdentiSys serves over 28,000 customers and provides complete support for card printing projects, including card design, printing and mailing. Customers expect high-quality cards, delivered quickly. To meet those demands, the company needs a card printer that can produce a large volume in a short timeframe – and was impressed with the combination of throughput and image clarity of Zebra's card printer.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Memphis Zoo
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: Memphis Zoo increases its security and streamlines its employee timekeeping by implementing an on-demand ID card printing system from LSI and Zebra Technologies.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: International Dragon Boat Federation
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: International Dragon Boat Federation uses Zebra card printers for competitor IDs.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: Lake County, ID, EMA
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: In order to make sure that only authorized individuals respond critical events, the Lake County EMA decided to print photo identification cards for its employees and volunteers. For heightened security, the agency chose to print the cards itself, on site, so that it could add confidential security features to the cards.

zebra-www/components/content/successStor.title: City College of San Francisco
zebra-www/components/content/successStor.text: As one of the largest community colleges in the country, City College of San Francisco provides a quality, affordable education option for the Bay Area. To streamline their processes, the City College needed to reduce the amount of time to print student ID cards while improving card image quality. With the Zebra ZXP Series 8 printing solutions they now print sharper-image student cards in 15 seconds.
